rows.action: Connect HC20->HC40 and dose 10 L of B into HC40 as a buffer.
Connect HC30->HC20, HC10->HC20, and HC40->HC20 to prepare all inflows to HC20.
Dose 1 L of A from HC10 to HC20.
Dose 2 L of B from HC40 to HC20.
Dose 3 L of C from HC30 to HC20.
Execute stirring at 150 rpm, usage, and settling in HC20.
Connect HC20->HC30 for later C recovery.
Separate 3 L of C from HC20 to HC30.
Separate 2 L of B from HC20 to HC40.
Separate 1 L of A from HC20 to HC10.

notes: This grouped trace mirrors the operation table reported in the paper.
The raw solver path retained in artifacts uses a lower-level symbolic-state representation and may contain more internal transitions.
